episodes.title: How I Escaped A Cult: Life After Total Brainwash
episodes.description:
For many, cults aren't just headlines; they are decades of stolen life. From the restrictive world of The Exclusive Brethren to the secret prophecies of The Janus Project, seven survivors pull back the curtain on the trauma of coercive control. Accompanied by insights from leadership experts and psychotherapists, this film explores the "cultic personality" and the agonizing struggle to reclaim one's will. It’s a powerful exploration of human vulnerability and the incredible strength required to walk away from the only world you’ve ever known.

Only Human celebrates and explores the unique and personal qualities we all have.  Our channel offers a range of TV series and documentaries about human experiences and life journeys - while looking at the challenges life throws at us, turning ordinary people into everyday heroes.
